employees.role_cn: 首席模拟经营设计研究员
responsibilities: Research core design theories of simulation management games
Analyze different sub-genres design characteristics
Study player psychology in simulation games
Develop team research framework and methodology
Write comprehensive research reports
expertise: Classic games analysis (SimCity, RollerCoaster Tycoon, Stardew Valley)

employees.role_cn: 经济系统与数值设计研究专员
responsibilities: Research in-game economic system design
Analyze resource production and consumption balance
Study numerical growth curves and long-term goals
Build economic system models and simulation tools
Summarize common economic issues and solutions

employees.role_cn: 生产链与资源管理研究专员
responsibilities: Research production chain design methods
Analyze resource management complexity design
Study supply-demand relationships and logistics systems
Summarize production chain depth vs usability balance
Build production chain design pattern library
expertise: Factorio and Oxygen Not Included case studies

employees.role_cn: 玩家决策与策略深度研究专员
responsibilities: Research player decision point design
Analyze strategy depth construction methods
Study difficulty curves and challenge design
Analyze different player type strategy preferences
Summarize replayability enhancement strategies

employees.role_cn: 内容与目标设计研究专员
responsibilities: Research short/mid/long-term goal design
Analyze content unlock pacing and freshness maintenance
Study narrative and worldbuilding in simulation games
Analyze random events and dynamic content design
Summarize content production efficiency and player retention
Build simulation game design knowledge base
Collect and organize classic case studies
Organize regular sharing sessions and workshops
Create research reports and presentation materials
Track latest trends in simulation games
expertise: Classic games database (Civilization, Cities Skylines, RimWorld, Dyson Sphere Program)

metadata.description: Simulation Management Game Design Research Team - 6 Member Configuration
